svg.title: Smart Canteen App — System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: Client Layer (Student and Admin mobile apps), Backend API Layer (Express.js controllers and middleware), Authentication Layer (Firebase Auth), and Data Persistence Layer (MongoDB Atlas with local fallback). Arrows show HTTPS REST, JWT, Firebase Admin SDK, and Mongoose ODM connections.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Student Mobile App interact with the backend?')
sendPrompt('How does the Admin Mobile App interact with the backend?')
sendPrompt('What does the JWT Auth Middleware do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Admin Role Guard do?')
sendPrompt('How does Zod validation work in the API?')
sendPrompt('What does the Auth Controller do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Food Controller do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Order Controller do?')
sendPrompt('What do the Cart, Wallet, and User controllers do?')
sendPrompt('How does Firebase Auth work in this system?')
sendPrompt('How is MongoDB Atlas used in this project?')
sendPrompt('When does the local MongoDB fallback activate?')
